micro_rules: Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.
Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.

rows.command_eng: Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.
rows.output: {"name":"Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour","cron":"0 0 * * *","period":0,"code":"(#Television).television_setchannel(7).delay(1 HOUR).television_setchannel(11)"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.","cron":"0 0 * * *","period":1800,"code":"(#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode(\"cool\").delay(1800).airconditioner_setairconditionermode(\"auto\")"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours","cron":"","period":0,"code":"(#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode(\"auto\"); delay(7200); (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode(\"sleep\")"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner temperature to 24 degrees and change it to 26 degrees after 1 hour.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the air conditioner temperature to 24 degrees and change it to 26 degrees after 1 hour.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"(#AirConditioner).airconditioner_settargettemperature(24)\ndelay(1 HOUR)\n(#AirConditioner).airconditioner_settargettemperature(26)"}
